zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine Daubeney於大約1365年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Giles Daubeney32歲，母親Lady Alainore de Willington29歲。她於大約1387年8月13日與Lord Richard II Champernoun在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1418年在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國戴文多德布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine Daubeney于大约1365年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Giles Daubeney32岁，母亲Lady Alainore de Willington29岁。她于大约1387年8月13日与Lord Richard II Champernoun在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1418年在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国戴文多德布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Daubeney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Daubney
meanings: English (mainly Lincolnshire; of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from any of several places in northern France called Aubigny, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Albinius (a derivative of Latin albus ‘white’; compare Albin ) + the habitational suffix -acum. Compare Dabney .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine Daubeney was born about 1365, in Devon, England, her father, Giles Daubeney, was 32 and her mother, Lady Alainore de Willington, was 29. She married Lord Richard II Champernoun about 13 August 1387, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1418, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Dodbrooke, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Katherine Daubeney est née environ 1365, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Giles Daubeney, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Alainore de Willington, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Richard II Champernoun environ 13 août 1387, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1418, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Dodbrooke, Devon, Angleterre.

de.Beer Ferrers, Devonshire, England: Bere Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Katherine Daubeney um 1365 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Giles Daubeney 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Alainore de Willington 29. Sie hat um 13. August 1387 in England Lord Richard II Champernoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1418 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dodbrooke, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Daubeney è nata il circa 1365 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Giles Daubeney, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Alainore de Willington, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Lord Richard II Champernoun circa 13 agosto 1387, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1418, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Dodbrooke, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Daubeneyが約1365年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Giles Daubeneyは32歳，母Lady Alainore de Willingtonは29歳であった。約1387年8月13日にイギリスでLord Richard II Champernounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1418年に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスデボンドドブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Daubeney(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Giles Daubeney(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alainore de Willington(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1387년 8월 13일 영국에서 Lord Richard II Champernoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1418년 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 도드브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Daubeney nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Giles Daubeney, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alainore de Willington, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Richard II Champernoun aproximadamente 13 de agosto de 1387, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1418, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Dodbrooke, Devon, Inglaterra.

ro.Beer Ferrers, Devonshire, England: Bere Ferrers, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine Daubeney родилась около 1365 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Giles Daubeney было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alainore de Willington, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Richard II Champernoun около 13 августа 1387 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1418 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности додбрук, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Katherine Daubeney nació aproximadamente 1365, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Giles Daubeney, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Alainore de Willington, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lord Richard II Champernoun aproximadamente 13 de agosto de 1387, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1418, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Dodbrooke, Devon, Inglaterra.
